THE TRAJECTORY · 04 OF 08
The trajectory

Enterprise token demand goes up
by an order of magnitude.

Agents use 5–30× more tokens than chat. By 2028, a third of enterprise applications include them. The economics of API-priced AI fall apart in this regime.

~18×
Token growth by 2030
Capgemini · Gartner · 2025
5–30×
More tokens per agentic task
Capgemini agentic AI report
33%
Enterprise apps agentic by 2028
Gartner · 2026
>40%
Cloud AI projects cancelled by 2027
Gartner cloud AI tracker
